title: Non GATE CSE - Digital Image Processing - Image Compression

questions.question:
Which of the following is used for the boundary representation of an image object?



Digital Image Processing: UGC NET CSE | July 2016 | Part 3 | Question: 60

In an image compression system 16384 bits are used to represent 256 \( \times \) 256 image with 256 gray levels. What is the compression ratio for this system?



Digital Image Processing: UGC NET CSE | June 2012 | Part 3 | Question: 10

The quantiser in an image-compression system is a



Digital Image Processing: UGC NET CSE | June 2012 | Part 3 | Question: 19
options: lossy element which exploits the psychovisual redundancy
lossless element which exploits the psychovisual redundancy
lossy element which exploits the statistical redundancy
lossless element which exploits the statistical redundancy
questions.correct_answer: lossy element which exploits the psychovisual redundancy

questions.question:
Given an image of size \( 1024 \times 1024 \) pixels in which intensity of each pixel is an \( 8 \)-bit quality. It requires _______ of storage space if the image is not compressed.



Digital Image Processing: UGC NET CSE | June 2014 | Part 3 | Question: 55
